commands.repair_reason: Active implementation PR needs contributor real-behavior proof and maintainer confirmation of the discovery/config-validation boundary; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.; Needs attention: The diff intentionally skips required config validation for undefined config in non-activating loads, which needs maintainer confirmation at the discovery registration boundary. commands.review_summary:
The branch defers undefined config validation in non-activating plugin loader and CLI metadata paths, adds regression tests, and adjusts two Swift brace-wrap formatting spots.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection. Current main validates entry?.config through params.value ?? {} in both manifest snapshot and CLI metadata paths, so strict required schemas can fail before non-activating metadata loads complete; I did not run a live external-plugin reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Active implementation PR needs contributor real-behavior proof and maintainer confirmation of the discovery/config-validation boundary; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: fix(plugins): defer undefined config validation in snapshot loads (Fixes #70658)
